sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Parnassus Core Equity Fund Sold Intuit (INTU) After Share Price Appreciation
feed.summary: Parnassus Investments' Core Equity Fund sold its position in Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU) during the third quarter of 2025, after significant share price appreciation. The fund aimed to lock in gains and reallocate capital to higher-conviction and more defensive positions, including Salesforce and Workday. Despite Intuit's strong performance, Parnassus believes certain AI stocks offer greater potential for higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: MAX S&P 500 4x Leveraged ETN ETF Price, Holdings, & News (NYSEARCA:SPYU)
feed.summary: The MAX S&P 500 4x Leveraged ETN (SPYU) is an exchange-traded note that tracks 4x the daily performance of a total return index comprised of US large-cap companies. Launched on December 7, 2023, SPYU has seen its stock increase by 20.3% this year, trading at $56.23. The ETN has an expense ratio of 0.95% and assets under management totaling $302.05 million.

feed.title: Best World ETFs
feed.summary: This article discusses the benefits and risks of investing in World ETFs, which are exchange-traded funds tracking broadly diversified global indices. It highlights Vanguard's Total World Stock Index Fund ETF (VT) and iShares' MSCI ACWI ETF (ACWI) as top choices, providing a comparison of their key features. The piece also explains how to choose the best World ETFs to align with investment goals and risk tolerance.

feed.title: Ovintiv outlines progress on NuVista Energy acquisition in new SEC filing
feed.summary: Ovintiv Inc. has provided an update on its planned acquisition of NuVista Energy Ltd., a transaction involving both stock and cash expected to close by the end of Q1 2026. NuVista has begun mailing management information circulars and proxy statements to its shareholders, detailing pro forma financial information for Ovintiv. The acquisition is subject to shareholder, regulatory, and court approvals, and has been met with positive analyst ratings due to its potential to enhance Ovintiv's productivity.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Riley Exploration Permian (NYSE:REPX) CEO Sells 20,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Riley Exploration Permian's CEO, Bobby Riley, sold 20,000 shares of the company's stock for over $518,000, reducing his stake by 5.41%. This occurred amid the company's approval of a $100 million share repurchase program and an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.40, indicating potential undervaluation and financial health. The stock has seen mixed analyst ratings recently, with an average "Buy" recommendation.

feed.title: ServiceNow to acquire Armis to expand cyber exposure and security across the full attack surface in IT, OT, and medical devices for companies, governments, and critical infrastructure worldwide
feed.summary: ServiceNow announced its acquisition of Armis for $7.75 billion in cash to enhance its security offerings and expand its cyber exposure management capabilities. This acquisition aims to create a unified, end-to-end security exposure and operations platform that covers IT, OT, and medical devices, significantly broadening ServiceNow's market opportunity for security and risk solutions. The combined entity will leverage AI to provide proactive cybersecurity and vulnerability response, addressing the growing attack surface driven by rapid AI adoption.

feed.title: Inside the $7.75B cybersecurity deal to protect every connected device
feed.summary: ServiceNow is acquiring Armis for $7.75 billion in cash to expand its cybersecurity offerings, particularly in managing cyber risk across IT, operational technology (OT), and medical devices. This acquisition aims to create a unified security platform that sees, decides, and acts across the entire technology footprint, significantly enhancing ServiceNow's market opportunity for security and risk solutions and accelerating its autonomous proactive cybersecurity roadmap. The deal will enable ServiceNow to provide end-to-end protection against AI-powered threats by integrating Armis' real-time asset discovery and risk prioritization with ServiceNow's automated remediation workflows.

feed.title: New catheter-based heart valve offers option for patients unfit for surgery
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences has received FDA approval for its SAPIEN M3 mitral valve replacement system, marking it as the first transcatheter therapy utilizing a transseptal approach for mitral regurgitation. This system provides a new treatment option for patients deemed unsuitable for traditional surgery or other repair therapies. The SAPIEN M3 offers a fully percutaneous mitral valve replacement, which has shown significant elimination of mitral regurgitation and improved patient symptoms and quality of life in clinical trials.

feed.title: New rooftop heat pump targets lower energy use in freezing temps
feed.summary: Carrier (CARR) has launched commercial field trials for its next-generation rooftop heat pump technology, which has demonstrated 100% heating capacity at 5°F and over 70% at -10°F during DOE lab verification. These trials, monitored by NREL, are part of the DOE Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge and are expected to conclude in summer 2027, with commercial availability targeted for the same period. The initiative aims to reduce energy consumption and operating costs in commercial buildings, even in cold climates.

feed.title: How a new SLB-Aramco deal uses Saudi gas in the global energy transition
feed.summary: SLB has secured a five-year, multi-billion-dollar contract from Aramco to provide stimulation services for its unconventional gas fields in Saudi Arabia. This agreement supports one of the world's largest unconventional gas development programs, aiming to diversify Saudi Arabia's energy portfolio and contribute to the global energy transition. The contract involves advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions, emphasizing gas as a pivotal fuel for energy demand and a bridge to lower-carbon systems.

feed.title: Kratos orders 60 hypersonic motors from L3Harris for defense programs By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:KTOS) has placed an order with L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) for 60 Zeus hypersonic motors (40 Zeus 1 and 20 Zeus 2), designed for defense programs. These motors aim to provide affordable commercial launch vehicle stages for hypersonic testing and research, reducing cost and risk. This order reinforces Kratos's strategy of investing in capability ahead of customer need, following a previous purchase of Oriole solid rocket motors.

feed.title: BlackRock Provides $102M Refi for Self Storage Portfolio
feed.summary: BlackRock Managed Funds and Accounts has provided Basis Industrial with a $101.5 million refinancing loan for a seven-property self storage portfolio located across six states. These seven facilities are the first properties developed and opened by Basis Industrial since launching its self storage development program in 2021. The portfolio includes properties in New Jersey, Pennsylvania, New York, Massachusetts, Florida, and Michigan, with the largest being a Public Storage facility in Berkeley Heights, N.J.

feed.title: Raytheon to deliver four Patriot defense systems to Spain in $1.7b deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has secured a $1.7 billion contract to provide Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems, marking Spain’s largest Patriot order to date. This agreement includes radars, launchers, command and control stations, and training equipment, contributing to RTX's significant revenue stream. The Patriot system is a combat-proven ground-based defense capability used by 19 countries and has effectively intercepted numerous aerial threats globally.

feed.title: Old Dominion Opens West Coast Container Drayage Facility
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line Inc. has opened its second container drayage facility in California, located in Oakland, to serve all ports, rail heads, and container yards in the state. This expansion follows a 35% increase in container drayage shipments nationwide during the first quarter of 2012, bolstering their network and better serving customers shipping globally and domestically. The new facility complements their existing Los Angeles drayage operation and 12 less-than-truckload (LTL) service centers across California.

feed.title: Old Dominion Opens Pair of Container Drayage Facilities
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. has expanded its drayage operations by opening two new container drayage facilities in Front Royal, Va., and Portland, Ore. These additions bring the total number of ports served directly by Old Dominion's OD-Global service to 20, enhancing their ability to move full container load (FCL) imports, exports, and domestic rail shipments across the continental U.S. The expansion aims to strengthen the company's network in the Mid-Atlantic and Pacific Northwest, meeting increased customer demand for both domestic and global shipping.

feed.title: News | RTX's Raytheon awarded $1.7 billion contract to deliver four Patriot fire units to Spain
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has been awarded a $1.7 billion contract to provide Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems, marking Spain's largest-ever order for these units. The contract includes radars, launchers, command and control stations, and training equipment, aiming to modernize Spain's air and missile defense capabilities. This agreement highlights Raytheon's ongoing collaboration with the Spanish government and local industry to ensure readiness against evolving threats.
